monster_001.name: Verdant Slime
monster_001.description: A gelatinous mass of corrupted mana. It digests anything it touches, leaving only clean bone.

monster_002.name: Glimmer Slime
monster_002.description: A translucent slime that refracts light. It hides in sunbeams to ambush prey.

monster_003.name: Goblin Grunt
monster_003.description: A stunted, vicious scavenger born from the Sundering. It covets shiny objects and fresh meat.

monster_004.name: Goblin Scout
monster_004.description: Faster and more cunning than its kin, it marks targets for the main raiding party.

monster_005.name: Bramble Goblin
monster_005.description: Its skin has hardened into bark-like armor, allowing it to blend perfectly with the twisted undergrowth.

monster_006.name: Forest Wolf Pup
monster_006.description: A predator twisted by the Veil, its eyes glowing with unnatural hunger.

monster_007.name: Hollow Spiderling
monster_007.description: A multi-legged horror that spins webs of sticky, mana-infused silk to entrap the unwary.

monster_008.name: Thicket Spider
monster_008.description: A silent hunter that drops from the canopy. Its venom dissolves armor as easily as flesh.

monster_009.name: Fen Wisp
monster_009.description: A flickering remnant of a soul lost to the Void, now seeking warmth to steal.

monster_010.name: Briar Hound
monster_010.description: A massive canine with thorns protruding from its mange-ridden hide.

monster_011.name: Mossback Tortoise
monster_011.description: Once a natural beast, now warped by the leaking energies of the Broken Veil.

monster_012.name: Vineling
monster_012.description: The forest itself, awakened by dark magic and twisted into a guardian of rot.

monster_013.name: Burbling Sprite
monster_013.description: A small, malicious fey creature that delights in leading travelers to their doom.

monster_014.name: Rookwood Shade
monster_014.description: A flickering remnant of a soul lost to the Void, now seeking warmth to steal.

monster_015.name: Gloam Hare
monster_015.description: Once a natural beast, now warped by the leaking energies of the Broken Veil.

monster_016.name: Young Treant
monster_016.description: A sapling given hateful life. It lashes out with branches that are hard as iron.

monster_017.name: Feral Stag
monster_017.description: Once a natural beast, now warped by the leaking energies of the Broken Veil.

monster_018.name: Sapling Ent
monster_018.description: Small but relentless, this animated plant swarm seeks to bury intruders in living soil.

monster_019.name: Ragged Urch
monster_019.description: A spiny, bottom-feeding scavenger that has grown to monstrous size.

monster_020.name: Ravaged Boar
monster_020.description: Once a natural beast, now warped by the leaking energies of the Broken Veil.

monster_021.name: Pine Wight
monster_021.description: A creature of the Shattered Veil, prowling the wilds in search of prey.

monster_022.name: Marsh Crawler
monster_022.description: A spiny, bottom-feeding scavenger that has grown to monstrous size.

monster_023.name: Sporeling
monster_023.description: A creature of the Shattered Veil, prowling the wilds in search of prey.

monster_024.name: Ridge Wolf
monster_024.description: A wolf adapted to the rocky slopes, its howl chills the blood of even seasoned travelers.

monster_025.name: Stormling
monster_025.description: A creature of the Shattered Veil, prowling the wilds in search of prey.

monster_026.name: Thornback Boar
monster_026.description: Once a natural beast, now warped by the leaking energies of the Broken Veil.

monster_027.name: Mire Lurker
monster_027.description: A spiny, bottom-feeding scavenger that has grown to monstrous size.

monster_028.name: Duskling
monster_028.description: A shadow that peels away from the darkness to strike. It fears the light of the crystals.

monster_029.name: Wisp-Sentinel
monster_029.description: A floating eye of burning mana that alerts nearby monsters to intruders.

monster_030.name: Gnarled Brute
monster_030.description: A creature of the Shattered Veil, prowling the wilds in search of prey.

monster_031.name: Shade Warden
monster_031.description: An armored spirit that guards the boundaries of the Veil, striking down all who trespass.

monster_032.name: Fen Revenant
monster_032.description: A drowned corpse animated by swamp magic, eternally seeking to drag others into the muck.

monster_033.name: Bramble King
monster_033.description: A massive, ancient entity that dominates its territory. Its very presence warps the air around it.

monster_034.name: Glade Empress
monster_034.description: A massive, ancient entity that dominates its territory. Its very presence warps the air around it.

monster_035.name: Sylvan Herald
monster_035.description: A ghostly figure that mimics the cries of lost children to lure travelers off the path.

monster_036.name: Elder Treant
monster_036.description: An ancient giant of the woods, its heartwood corrupted by centuries of Veil exposure.

monster_037.name: Abyssal Wolf
monster_037.description: A creature of nightmares, its fur absorbs light and its bite inflicts a creeping cold.

monster_038.name: Blight Stag
monster_038.description: Once a natural beast, now warped by the leaking energies of the Broken Veil.

monster_039.name: Wretched Entling
monster_039.description: A twisted mockery of life, leaking poisonous sap from its cracked bark.

monster_040.name: Nightbloom
monster_040.description: A beautiful but deadly flower that releases paralytic pollen when approached.

monster_041.name: Verdant Slime
monster_041.description: A massive convergence of lesser slimes. Its acidic touch melts steel in seconds.

monster_042.name: Glimmer Slime
monster_042.description: Radiating a blinding light, this slime disorients its victims before consuming them.

monster_043.name: Goblin Grunt
monster_043.description: A battle-scarred goblin veteran, wielding stolen weapons with deadly proficiency.

monster_044.name: Goblin Scout
monster_044.description: A master tracker that never loses its quarry. It strikes from the shadows with lethal precision.

monster_045.name: Bramble Goblin
monster_045.description: Covered in iron-hard thorns, this goblin is a walking fortress of the forest.

monster_046.name: Forest Wolf Pup
monster_046.description: The alpha of the litter, grown to monstrous size and cunning.

monster_047.name: Hollow Spiderling
monster_047.description: A broodmother in the making, its webs are nearly invisible and unbreakable.

monster_048.name: Thicket Spider
monster_048.description: An ancient arachnid that has feasted on mana stones, granting it terrifying speed.

monster_049.name: Fen Wisp
monster_049.description: A coalesced storm of soul-energy, burning with a cold and hungry fire.

monster_050.name: Briar Hound
monster_050.description: A predator twisted by the Veil, its eyes glowing with unnatural hunger.

monster_101.name: Crystal Golem
monster_101.description: A lumbering construct of jagged quartz, ancient and unyielding.

monster_102.name: Prism Spider
monster_102.description: Its translucent carapace makes it hard to track in the shimmering light.

monster_103.name: Shard Wisp
monster_103.description: A floating orb of condensed mana and light.

monster_104.name: Obsidian Gargoyle
monster_104.description: Carved from volcanic glass, it swoops down with crushing weight.

monster_105.name: Crystalline Guardian
monster_105.description: The heart of the caverns, a massive entity of living light and stone.

monster_106.name: Fire Elemental
monster_106.description: A living pillar of flame that scorches the air around it.

monster_107.name: Magma Golem
monster_107.description: Molten rock given form, its steps shake the ground.

monster_108.name: Ember Salamander
monster_108.description: A quick, lizard-like creature that scurries through lava pools.

monster_109.name: Lava Drake
monster_109.description: A lesser dragon with scales like cooled volcanic rock.

monster_110.name: Ignis, Lord of Cinders
monster_110.description: An ancient spirit of fire, clad in armor of obsidian and hate.

monster_111.name: Frost Wolf
monster_111.description: Its white fur blends perfectly with the snow, hiding its deadly intent.

monster_112.name: Ice Golem
monster_112.description: A construct of animate permafrost, slow but relentless.

monster_113.name: Chill Wisp
monster_113.description: A flickering spirit of cold light that saps warmth from the air.

monster_114.name: Glacial Drake
monster_114.description: A winged predator with scales of blue ice, hunting the frozen wastes.

monster_115.name: Cryon, the Frozen King
monster_115.description: An ancient giant clad in glacial armor, ruling the eternal winter.

monster_116.name: Void Stalker
monster_116.description: A silhouette that moves between shadows, striking with unseen blades.

monster_117.name: Abyssal Construct
monster_117.description: Armor animated by a void spirit, relentless and unfeeling.

monster_118.name: Null Wisp
monster_118.description: A sphere of anti-light that distorts the air around it.

monster_119.name: Entropy Drake
monster_119.description: A twisted dragon whose scales seem to devour reality itself.

monster_120.name: Omega, The Void Heart
monster_120.description: The center of the void. To look upon it is to know the end.

monster_121.name: Coral Golem
monster_121.description: A walking reef of sharp coral and sea-stone, animated by ancient magic.

monster_122.name: Abyssal Eel
monster_122.description: A serpent of the deep that moves with terrifying speed.

monster_123.name: Tide Siren
monster_123.description: Its song is beautiful, but its intent is deadly.

monster_124.name: Deep Crawler
monster_124.description: A massive crustacean with armor thick enough to turn blades.

monster_125.name: Leviathan
monster_125.description: The king of the sunken depths. It swallows light and hope alike.

monster_126.name: Cogwork Spider
monster_126.description: A mechanical arachnid that skitters across the metal floor with unnerving precision.

monster_127.name: Brass Golem
monster_127.description: A heavy construct of polished brass, powered by a glowing steam core.

monster_128.name: Steam Wisp
monster_128.description: A sentient cloud of superheated steam and mana.

monster_129.name: Automaton Knight
monster_129.description: An ancient war machine programmed to defend the halls for eternity.

monster_130.name: The Gear Warden
monster_130.description: The massive central processing unit of the Clockwork Halls, armed and dangerous.

monster_131.name: Ash Rat
monster_131.description: A scavenger adapted to the toxic ash, its fur is stiff with soot.

monster_132.name: Cinder Mite
monster_132.description: A small insectoid creature that glows with internal heat.

monster_133.name: Ember Fox
monster_133.description: A fox wreathed in flickering flames, elusive and dangerous.

monster_134.name: Scorched Scavenger
monster_134.description: A humanoid figure twisted by the ash, searching for scraps of metal.

monster_135.name: Slag Golem
monster_135.description: A lumbering mass of molten rock and iron, formed from the waste of the Sundering.

monster_136.name: Zephyr Wisp
monster_136.description: A playful but dangerous spirit of wind that can knock a warrior off their feet.

monster_137.name: Cloud Ray
monster_137.description: A flat-bodied creature that glides effortlessly through the high-altitude currents.

monster_138.name: Storm Griffin
monster_138.description: A majestic beast with the head of an eagle and body of a lion, crackling with static.

monster_139.name: Thunder Roc
monster_139.description: A massive bird of prey whose wingspan blocks out the sun. Its cry summons storms.

monster_140.name: Tempest Guardian
monster_140.description: An ancient construct of clouds and lightning, eternally guarding the highest peaks.
